name: Qwen-VL
license: Tongyi Qianwen LICENSE AGREEMENT (custom, free for research and commercial use)
archDisplay: OpenCLIP ViT-bigG vision encoder + Qwen-7B decoder, single-layer cross-attention position-aware adapter
note: First Qwen VLM (ViT-bigG + Qwen-7B, 9.6B total); accepts image/text/bounding-box input and can output bounding boxes for grounding.
